entities.name: vosoritide

attributes.drug_class: modified recombinant human C-type natriuretic peptide (CNP) analogue

entities.context: Vosoritide (VOXZOGO) is a modified recombinant human C-type natriuretic peptide (CNP) analogue, being developed by BioMarin Pharmaceutical for the treatment of achondroplasia.

entities.name: C-type natriuretic peptide
entities.context: Vosoritide (VOXZOGO) is a modified recombinant human C-type natriuretic peptide (CNP) analogue

entities.name: Achondroplasia
entities.context: being developed by BioMarin Pharmaceutical for the treatment of achondroplasia. Achondroplasia is caused by a gain-of-function mutation in the fibroblast growth factor receptor 3 gene (FGFR3)

entities.name: FGFR3
entities.context: Achondroplasia is caused by a gain-of-function mutation in the fibroblast growth factor receptor 3 gene (FGFR3), which is a negative regulator of bone growth.

entities.name: FGFR3 protein
entities.context: the fibroblast growth factor receptor 3 gene (FGFR3), which is a negative regulator of bone growth.

entities.name: NPR-B
entities.context: Vosoritide acts to restore chondrogenesis through its binding to natriuretic peptide receptor B (NPR-B)

entities.name: NPR-B agonism restoring chondrogenesis via FGFR3 pathway inhibition
entities.context: Vosoritide acts to restore chondrogenesis through its binding to natriuretic peptide receptor B (NPR-B), resulting in the inhibition of downstream signalling pathways of the overactive FGFR3 gene.

entities.name: FGFR3 downstream signalling pathway
entities.context: resulting in the inhibition of downstream signalling pathways of the overactive FGFR3 gene

entities.name: BioMarin Pharmaceutical
entities.context: being developed by BioMarin Pharmaceutical for the treatment of achondroplasia

entities.name: EU approval of vosoritide for achondroplasia (August 2021)

attributes.indication: achondroplasia in patients aged >= 2 years whose epiphyses are not closed

entities.context: Vosoritide was approved in August 2021 in the EU for the treatment of achondroplasia in patients aged >= 2 years whose epiphyses are not closed

entities.name: US regulatory review of vosoritide
entities.context: The drug is also under regulatory review in the USA for the treatment of achondroplasia

relations.evidence: Vosoritide was approved in August 2021 in the EU for the treatment of achondroplasia in patients aged >= 2 years whose epiphyses are not closed
Vosoritide (VOXZOGO) is a modified recombinant human C-type natriuretic peptide (CNP) analogue, being developed by BioMarin Pharmaceutical for the treatment of achondroplasia.
